# pfsense_ipsec_phase1 (Resource)

IPsec [Phase 1](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/vpn/ipsec/configure.html) tunnel configuration. Defines the IKE SA parameters for establishing a VPN tunnel.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `authentication_method` (String) Authentication method (pre_shared_key, cert, etc.).
- `encryption` (Attributes List) Encryption algorithm configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--encryption))
- `ike_type` (String) IKE version (ikev1, ikev2, auto).
- `interface` (String) Interface for the IPsec tunnel endpoint.
- `lifetime` (String) SA lifetime in seconds.
- `mobike` (String) MOBIKE protocol setting (on, off).
- `my_id_type` (String) Local identifier type (myaddress, fqdn, user_fqdn, dyn_dns, etc.).
- `nat_traversal` (String) NAT traversal setting (on, force).
- `peer_id_type` (String) Peer identifier type (peeraddress, fqdn, user_fqdn, etc.).
- `protocol` (String) IP protocol version (inet, inet6, both).

### Optional

- `apply` (Boolean) Apply change, defaults to `true`.
- `ca_ref` (String) CA reference for certificate-based authentication.
- `cert_ref` (String) Certificate reference for certificate-based authentication.
- `close_action` (String) Close action (none, start, trap).
- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether this phase 1 entry is disabled.
- `dpd_delay` (String) Dead peer detection delay in seconds.
- `dpd_max_fail` (String) Dead peer detection maximum failures.
- `gw_duplicates` (Boolean) Allow multiple phase 1 entries with the same remote gateway.
- `ike_port` (String) Custom IKE port (default 500).
- `mobile` (Boolean) Whether this is a mobile client tunnel.
- `my_id_data` (String) Local identifier data.
- `natt_port` (String) Custom NAT-T port (default 4500).
- `peer_id_data` (String) Peer identifier data.
- `pkcs11_cert_ref` (String) PKCS#11 certificate reference.
- `pkcs11_pin` (String, Sensitive) PKCS#11 PIN.
- `pre_shared_key` (String, Sensitive) Pre-shared key for authentication.
- `prf_select_enable` (Boolean) Enable PRF selection.
- `rand_time` (String) Random time range in seconds.
- `reauth_time` (String) Re-authentication time in seconds.
- `rekey_time` (String) Rekey time in seconds.
- `remote_gateway` (String) IP address or hostname of the remote gateway.
- `split_conn` (Boolean) Split connections.
- `start_action` (String) Start action (none, start, trap).
- `tfc_bytes` (String) TFC bytes value.
- `tfc_enable` (Boolean) Enable Traffic Flow Confidentiality.

### Read-Only

- `ike_id` (String) Unique IKE identifier for this phase 1 entry.

<a id="nestedatt--encryption"></a>
### Nested Schema for `encryption`

Required:

- `algorithm` (String) Encryption algorithm name.
- `dh_group` (String) Diffie-Hellman group number.
- `hash_algorithm` (String) Hash algorithm.

Optional:

- `key_length` (String) Key length in bits.
- `prf_algorithm` (String) PRF algorithm.
